It will search customers by customer id (owId), organization name. || owIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | Filter customers list for provided customer owIds. || owStatusIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | Filter customers list for provided customer statuses. Default value :- `[1,4]`. Status id should be from [organization-workspace-status](?path=/User%20Management%20API/OrganizationWorkspaceStatus) || provideRunningCampaigns `[optional]` | Boolean | To get running campaign count. Default value is `false`. |

parameters.description: True, return only workspaces with at least one advertiser. False, return all workspaces regardless of advertiser presence

UserStatusRequestVO.description: Request model for updating user status, containing the user's organization workspace ID, new status, and optional reason for the status change

uowId.description: Organization workspace ID of the user whose status is to be updated

status.description: New status for the user. Allowed values: 1=Active, 2=Pending, 3=invited, 4=suspended, 5=deleted

statusReason.description: Optional reason for the status change, required if status is set to 4 (Suspended)

CreateWorkspaceRequestVO.description: Request object for creating a new workspace

ValidateDomainResponseVO.description: Response model for validating if an email domain is valid for a workspace, containing the validation result and an optional message

message.description: Optional message providing additional information about the domain validation result
message.example: Email domain is valid for the workspace

ValidateWorkspaceRequestVO.description: Request model for validating if a user email belongs to a specific workspace domain, containing the user's email and the workspace domain to validate against

email.description: Email address of the user to validate

ResetPasswordRequestVO.description: Request model for resetting password using an invite hash, containing the invite hash and the new password

inviteHash.description: Unique invite hash sent to the user's email for password reset

password.description: New password that the user wants to set

ValidateResetPasswordInvitationResponseV.description: Response model for validating reset password invitation, including validity status, associated email, and reason for invalidity if applicable

resetEmail.description: Email associated with the reset password invitation if valid

invalidReason.description: Reason for invalidity if the reset password invitation is not valid

UpdatePasswordRequestVO.description: Request model for updating password, containing old and new passwords

oldPassword.description: Current password that the user wants to change

newPassword.description: New password that the user wants to set

allowedApps.description: List of allowed application IDs for the invited user

successfulEmails.description: List of successfully invited email addresses

ValidateWorkspaceUserResponseVO.description: Response model for validating if a user email belongs to a specific workspace domain, containing the validation result, the user's OW ID if valid, and whether the workspace is allowed

owId.description: OW ID of the user if the email is valid, otherwise 0

ValidateWorkspaceUserRequestVO.description: Request model for validating if a user email belongs to a specific workspace domain, containing the user's email and the workspace domain to validate against

email.description: Email address of the user to validate

UserCustomerAssociateRequestVO.description: Request model for associating a user with customers, including organization workspace IDs, login access flags, and customer access flags

logInAccessOwIds.description: Comma-separated organization workspace IDs for login access

removeLogInAccessOwIds.description: Comma-separated organization workspace IDs to remove login access

removeOwIds.description: Comma-separated organization workspace IDs to remove

isLogInAccess.description: Flag indicating if the user has login access

isCustomerAccess.description: Flag indicating if the user has customer access

ValidateCurrentPasswordResponseVO.description: Response model for validating the current password, containing whether the password is valid and an optional message

message.description: Optional message providing additional information about the password validation result

ValidatePasswordRequestVO.description: Request model for validating password, containing the password to validate

UserApplicationAccessRequestVO.description: Request model for granting user access to applications, including user ID, application IDs, and access level

userId.description: ID of the user to whom access is being granted

appIds.description: Comma-separated list of application IDs to which access is being granted. Example: '1,2,3'

accessLevel.description: Access level being granted to the user for the specified applications

CommonResponseRedirect.description: Common response with message string and redirect URL

redirectUrl.description: Redirect URL for the client to navigate to after successful operation

CreateUserRequestVO.description: Request model for creating a new user, including email, password, and optional invite hash

email.description: Email address of the new user

inviteHash.description: Optional invite hash if the user is signing up through an invitation

WhitelabelPixelUrlRequestVO.description: Request model for updating the white-label pixel URL, containing a single required field for the new pixel URL. This model is used to facilitate the update of the white-label pixel configuration for an organization.

whitelabelPixelUrl.description: The new white-label pixel URL to be set for the organization

WhiteLabelDomainRequestVO.description: Request model for configuring a white label domain, containing the white label domain to be added for the organization. The 'whitelabelDomain' field is required and must not be blank, representing the subdomain that the organization wants to use for their white label configuration.

whitelabelDomain.description: The white label domain to be added for the organization. This field is required and must not be blank. It represents the subdomain that the organization wants to use for their white label configuration.

chiefName.description: Name of the chief executive officer

legalInfo.example: Legal info about the advertiser profile

links.description: List of links related to the advertiser profile

MfaUpdateRequestVO.description: MFA update request containing user IDs for which MFA needs to be updated

userIds.description: Set of user IDs for which MFA needs to be updated

mfaEnabledSuccessfully.description: List of user IDs for which MFA was enabled successfully

mfaEnablingFailed.description: List of user IDs for which MFA enabling failed

mfaDisabledSuccessfully.description: List of user IDs for which MFA was disabled successfully

mfaDisablingFailed.description: List of user IDs for which MFA disabling failed

LoginResponseVO.description: Login response containing authentication tokens and session details

access_token.description: JWT access token for authenticating subsequent API requests

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token used to obtain a new access token

expires_at.description: Token expiration timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

scope.description: OAuth scope granted to the token

owId.description: Organization workspace ID of the authenticated user

mfa_required.description: Whether multi-factor authentication is required for this user

UserLoginRequestVO.description: Request model for user login, including grant type, email, and password

email.description: Email address of the user logging in

password.description: Password of the user logging in

isExpired.description: Indicates if the invitation is expired

inviteEmail.description: Email address to which the invitation was sent

invitedToWorkspace.description: Workspace to which the user was invited

isIHPCustomer.description: Indicates if the user is an IHP customer

isNewUser.description: Indicates if the user is new

isInviteProcessed.description: Indicates if the invitation has been processed

isInviteProcessing.description: Indicates if the invitation is being processed

isInviteCancelled.description: Indicates if the invitation has been cancelled

isInviteDeleted.description: Indicates if the invitation has been deleted

owStatusIds.description: List of organization workspace status IDs

provideRunningCampaigns.description: Flag to indicate if running campaigns should be provided

CustomerApplicationAccessRequestVO.description: Request model for granting customer application access, including OW ID, application IDs, and access level

owId.description: OW ID of the customer for whom access is being granted

appIds.description: Comma-separated list of application IDs for which access is being granted

accessLevel.description: Access level for the customer application

MfaVerifyResponseVO.description: Response model for MFA verification, containing fields for access token, token type, expiration time, and user ID. This model is used to represent the result of an MFA verification process, providing essential information for authentication and session management purposes.

accessToken.description: JWT access token for authenticating API requests

expiresIn.description: Expiration time of the token in seconds

owId.description: Organizational workspace ID associated with the user

UpdateUserProfileResponseVO.description: Response model for updating user profile, containing user ID, display name, user avatar URL, and a message indicating the result of the update operation

userAvatar.description: URL of the user's avatar image

message.description: Message indicating the result of the update operation

UpdateWorkspaceDomainRequestVO.description: Request model for updating workspace domain, containing the new subdomain to be set for the workspace

workspaceSubDomain.description: New workspace subdomain to be set for the workspace

UpdateOrganizationProfileResponseVO.description: Response model for updating organization profile, including updated organization details and a success message

UpdateOrganizationEmailResponseVO.description: Response model for updating organization email, containing the updated email address and a success message

email.description: Updated email address of the organization

message.description: Success message for the email update operation

UpdateOrganizationEmailRequestVO.description: Request model for updating organization email, containing the new email address to be set for the organization

email.description: New email address for the organization

chiefName.description: Name of the chief executive officer

legalInfo.example: Legal info about the advertiser profile

links.description: List of links related to the advertiser profile

CustomerRejectRequestVO.description: Request model for rejecting a customer sign-up request, including OW ID and rejection reason

owId.description: OW ID of the customer being rejected

statusReason.description: Reason for rejecting the customer sign-up request

statusReason.example: Customer requested to reactivate their account.

customerOperationsDetails.description: Customer operations details to be edited

resetFields.description: Flags to indicate which fields should be reset to default values. If not provided, all fields will be updated with the provided values. If provided, only the fields with reset flag set to true will be reset to default values, and the rest of the fields will be updated with the provided values.

UserBasicListResponseVO.description: Response model for basic user information, containing fields such as user ID, name, email, status, profile URL, creation timestamp, and MFA details. This model is used to represent essential user information in a structured format when retrieving user details or lists of users, providing a comprehensive overview of the user's profile and account status for management and display purposes.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user

firstName.description: The first name of the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

statusId.description: The status ID of the user

userProfileUrl.description: The URL of the user's profile picture

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created

mfaEnabled.description: Indicates whether multi-factor authentication (MFA) is enabled for the user

canToggleMfa.description: Indicates whether the user has the ability to toggle MFA settings

mfaDisabledCount.description: Count of users with MFA disabled

mfaEnabledCount.description: Count of users with MFA enabled

UserRemainingCustomerDetailVO.description: Detailed information about remaining customers for a user, including access flags

isLogInAccess.description: Indicates if the user has login access to the system

isCustomerAccess.description: Indicates if the user has access to customer details

isOrganizationOwnerUser.description: Indicates if the user is an organization owner

isModificationAllowed.description: Indicates if modifications are allowed for this user

UserRemainingCustomerResponseVO.description: Response model for remaining customers with pagination details and access flags

CommonResponseInteger.description: Common response with data as integer

UserAssignedCustomerDetailVO.description: Detailed information about a customer assigned to a user, including access level and modification permissions

access.description: Access level of the user for the assigned customer

isModificationAllowed.description: Indicates if the user is allowed to modify the assigned customer

UserAssignedCustomerResponseVO.description: Response object for user assigned customers with pagination details

isLogInAccess.description: Indicates if the user has login access to any of the assigned customers

isCustomerAccess.description: Indicates if the user has access to any of the assigned customers

UserAllowedOrganizationDetailVO.description: User allowed organization detail with current organization

allowExtendedReportDuration.description: Allowed extended report duration in days

OrganizationUrlDetailVO.description: Details of an organization's URL, including the label and the URL itself.

label.description: The label for the organization's URL

url.description: The URL associated with the organization

WhiteLabelSettingResponseVO.description: Response model for white label settings, containing the organization's fav icon details, a flag indicating whether to include the organization name in the white label, the landing page URL, and lists of header and footer URLs for the white label configuration.

favIcons.description: Details of the organization's fav icons for the white label configuration

isIncludeOrganizationName.description: Flag indicating whether to include the organization name in the white label configuration

landingPage.description: The landing page URL for the white label configuration

headerUrls.description: List of header URLs for the white label configuration

footerUrls.description: List of footer URLs for the white label configuration

WhiteLabelDomainVerifyResponseVO.description: Response model for verifying white label domain, containing the verification status, the domain being verified, and an optional message providing additional details about the verification result

verified.description: Indicates whether the white label domain is verified successfully

domain.description: The white label domain that was verified

message.description: Optional message providing additional details about the verification result
message.example: The domain is available for use

WorkspaceDomainResponseVO.description: Response model for checking workspace domain availability, containing the domain name and its availability status

owId.description: Organization workspace ID associated with the advertiser profile

chiefName.description: Name of the chief executive officer

legalInfo.example: Legal info about the advertiser profile

links.description: List of links related to the advertiser profile

WorkspaceInitDetailVO.description: WorkspaceInitDetailVO represents the details required for initializing a workspace, including workspace and organization information, branding assets, support contact, and workspace URL details.

largeLogoUrl.description: URL for the large logo of the workspace

smallLogoUrl.description: URL for the small logo of the workspace

ihpOwner.description: Flag indicating whether the user is an IHP owner

isIncludeOrganizationName.description: Flag indicating whether to include the organization name in the workspace branding

passwordNote.example: Your password must be at least 8 characters long.

WorkspaceUrlResponseVO.description: WorkspaceUrlResponseVO represents the details of workspace URLs, including landing pages, help URLs, header URLs, and footer URLs.

landingPages.description: List of landing pages for the workspace

help_url.description: List of help URLs for the workspace

header.description: List of header URLs for the workspace

footer.description: List of footer URLs for the workspace

isOwnerUser.description: Indicates if the user is the owner of the organization

apps.description: List of applications associated with the user

userCount.description: Number of users associated with the application

isAccess.description: Indicates if the organization has access

customers.description: List of customers under the organization

activeCampaignsCount.description: Number of active campaigns for the organization

statusCount.description: Count of customers in the given status

chiefName.description: Name of the chief executive officer

legalInfo.example: Tech Solutions is a leading technology company specializing in software development and IT consulting services.

isVerified.description: Indicates if the white label domain is verified

AdminUserListResponseVO.description: Response model for admin user list, containing fields for the user's name and ID. This model is used to represent individual user records in the response when retrieving a list of admin users, providing essential information for user management and administration purposes.

userName.description: The name of the admin user

userId.description: The unique identifier of the admin user
